hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read file_path; if echo "$file_path" | grep -qE '\.(js|ts|cjs|mjs|d\.cts|d\.mts|jsx|tsx|json|jsonc)$'; then npx eslint --fix "$file_path"; fi; }
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read file_path; if echo "$file_path" | grep -qE '\.(js|ts|cjs|mjs|d\.cts|d\.mts|jsx|tsx|json|jsonc)$'; then npx prettier --write "$file_path"; fi; }
